title: Area
text: Area An area is a development object that represents an area frame on a Form or Report component. It is used to group objects and style the area it encloses. Characteristics Characteristics Icon: Object type code: are Main Development Object? No Part of: Form , Report , Component Entity Contains: Property , Component Entity , Area Generalization: Frame Specializations: None Compilation Output: — URI format: cpt: ComponentName /are: AreaId Specialization Area specializes Frame in the following ways: It has no code container. Properties Object properties: Name Type Location Presentation properties: Widget Type Left (xpos) Top (ypos) Width (xsize) Height (ysize) Horizontal Repetition Vertical Repetition Border Index Color The following properties can be used to style the area frame, based on the Widget Type : Table 1. Frame Widget Style Properties Physical Property Name Property Attach Attach to Window Border (attach) BorderType BorderType BorderRadius Border Radius (BorderRadius) Color Properties BackColor Background Color (BackColor) ForeColor Foreground Color (ForeColor) BorderColor Border Color (BorderColor) BackColorFill Gradient Fill Style (BackColorFill) BackcolorStart Gradient Color Start (BackColorStart) GradientStart Gradient Start ( GradientStart) DropShadowColor Drop Shadow Color ( DropShadowColor) Background Image Properties BackImage Background Image (BackImage) Halign Horizontal Alignment (Halign) Valign Vertical Alignment ( Valign) Hscale Horizontal Scaling ( Hscale) Vscale Vertical Scaling ( Vscale) PreserveAspect Preserve Aspect Ratio ( PreserveAspect) Related Links Area Frames and Lines Area frames are objects that can be used to group or separate the contents of a Form component.
